allow.reason: Intentional host-local timestamp — 施主 #228 case A (2026-07-21). Documents/records are host-local by design (電帳法 JST semantics); no display harm, verified live (docs/qa/2026-07-21-e4-228-decision-package.md). UtcClock injection is case B/C, deferred to W3 regen.
